title: Operation Jet Lag Exorcism
notes: Full-body reboot session after travel and reacclimation. Strength, endurance, core.

items: Shoulder circles, hip openers, band pull-aparts

blocks.name: Barbell Foundation Reboot
blocks.instructions: Controlled tempo, moderate loading, reacquaint CNS with barbell rhythm.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: Load: 45 + 25 + 5 per side. Form: Chest tall, ellows up.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Load: 45 per side. Form: Flat back, pause at top.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Load: 25 per side. Form: Lockout, no lean back.

blocks.name: Bodyweight Volume & Core
blocks.instructions: Classic density pairing for upper body and trunk durability.

exercises.name: Hand-Release Pushups
exercises.notes: Maintain core tencion, full range reps.

blocks.name: Aerobic Capacity Flush
blocks.instructions: 2:1 work rest ratio. Keep quality form under fatigue.

exercises.name: Treadmill Intervals
exercises.notes: 1:2 rest ratio. Cooldown 3m incline walk finish.
